# Dreamline Production — AI Context File

## Who We Are
Dreamline Production is a premier cinematic visual house based in Kolkata, India. Established in 2010, we specialize in high-end wedding photography, corporate ad films, and commercial visual storytelling. We are known for our cinematic approach, using advanced lighting and color grading techniques to create film-like visuals.

## What We Do
- **Wedding Photography & Cinematography**: We document weddings with a cinematic flair, focusing on candid moments, storytelling, and premium editing.
- **Corporate & Commercial Films**: We produce high-quality ad films, product shoots, and corporate documentaries for brands.
- **Visual Storytelling**: Our expertise extends to music videos, short films, and portfolio shoots for models and actors.

## Key Facts
- **Location**: Haridevpur, Kolkata, West Bengal.
- **Experience**: Over 15 years in the industry.
- **Reputation**: Rated 4.9/5 stars based on 150+ reviews across Google and Justdial.
- **Contact**: santrarony9@gmail.com | +91 9886679945
- **Website**: https://dreamlineproduction.com

---

## Technical Architecture

### Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 15 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, Framer Motion
- **Backend**: Next.js API Routes (serverless on Vercel), Express.js legacy server (`/server/server.js`)
- **Database**: MongoDB Atlas via Mongoose
- **Storage**: AWS S3 (`dreamlinepro` bucket, `ap-south-2` region) — images auto-converted to WebP via Sharp
- **Auth**: NextAuth.js with Credentials provider, JWT sessions (7-day), httpOnly cookies
- **Hosting**: Vercel (production)

### Project Structure
```
Final/
├── src/
│   ├── app/                    # Next.js App Router
│   │   ├── page.js             # Homepage (ISR 10 min + on-demand revalidation)
│   │   ├── about/page.js       # About page
│   │   ├── luxury/page.js      # Luxury weddings page
│   │   ├── commercial/page.js  # Commercial works page
│   │   ├── journal/            # Journal/blog pages (list + [id] detail)
│   │   ├── wedding/[id]/       # Individual wedding detail
│   │   ├── tech/               # Tech portfolio page
│   │   ├── contact/            # Contact page
│   │   ├── admin/              # Admin panel (protected by middleware)
│   │   │   ├── home/page.js    # Home content editor
│   │   │   ├── about/page.js   # About content editor
│   │   │   ├── gallery/page.js # Project gallery editor
│   │   │   ├── weddings/page.js# Wedding CRUD
│   │   │   ├── journal/page.js # Journal CRUD
│   │   │   ├── luxury/page.js  # Luxury page editor
│   │   │   ├── global/page.js  # Global settings (SEO, contact, social)
│   │   │   └── login/page.js   # Admin login
│   │   ├── api/
│   │   │   ├── auth/[...nextauth]/route.js  # NextAuth config
│   │   │   ├── content/route.js     # GET/POST site content (+ on-demand revalidation)
│   │   │   ├── weddings/route.js    # CRUD weddings (+ on-demand revalidation)
│   │   │   ├── journals/route.js    # CRUD journals (+ on-demand revalidation)
│   │   │   ├── bookings/route.js    # POST booking inquiry (with input validation)
│   │   │   ├── upload/route.js      # Server-side upload (Sharp optimization)
│   │   │   ├── upload/presigned/route.js # Pre-signed S3 URL for direct browser upload
│   │   │   ├── revalidate/route.js  # On-demand ISR revalidation endpoint
│   │   │   ├── tracking/view/route.js # Page view analytics
│   │   │   └── tech/route.js        # Tech projects CRUD (with SSRF protection)
│   │   ├── layout.js           # Root layout (SEO, JSON-LD, Google Analytics)
│   │   ├── sitemap.js          # Dynamic sitemap generation
│   │   └── robots.js           # Robots.txt config
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── admin/ImageUploader.js  # S3 upload component (presigned URL flow)
│   │   ├── home/               # Homepage section components
│   │   ├── global/             # SmoothScroll, MediaProtection
│   │   ├── Navbar.js, Footer.js, Preloader.js, CustomCursor.js
│   │   └── PublicLayoutWrapper.js
│   ├── models/                 # Mongoose models
│   │   ├── Content.js          # Single-document site content (huge schema)
│   │   ├── Wedding.js, Journal.js, Booking.js, TechProject.js, Analytics.js
│   ├── lib/mongodb.js          # Cached MongoDB connection
│   ├── middleware.js           # NextAuth middleware (protects /admin/*)
│   └── context/                # ThemeContext, AuthProvider
├── server/                     # Legacy Express server (not used on Vercel)
├── api/                        # Legacy API config files
├── next.config.mjs             # Next.js config (images, security headers)
├── vercel.json                 # Vercel deployment config
└── public/                     # Static assets (llms.txt, logo, sitemap.xml)
```

### Key Patterns
- **Upload Flow**: `ImageUploader.js` → `/api/upload/presigned` (gets presigned S3 URL) → browser PUTs directly to S3. Both routes require `export const runtime = 'nodejs'`.
- **Content Model**: A single MongoDB document holds ALL site content (home, about, luxury, commercial sections). Admin edits are saved via `$set` updates.
- **ISR + On-Demand Revalidation**: Pages use `revalidate = 600` (10 min) as fallback. Admin save operations call `revalidatePath()` to clear cache immediately.
- **Security**: Auth requires env vars (`NEXTAUTH_SECRET`, `ADMIN_USER`, `ADMIN_PASS`). Security headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.) configured in `next.config.mjs`. Booking API uses explicit field extraction. Tech API has SSRF protection.

### Required Environment Variables (Vercel)
- `NEXTAUTH_SECRET` — Random 32+ char string for JWT signing
- `NEXTAUTH_URL` — `https://dreamlineproduction.com`
- `ADMIN_USER` — Admin username
- `ADMIN_PASS` — Admin password
- `MONGODB_URI` — MongoDB Atlas connection string
- `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID`, `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY` — S3 credentials
- `AWS_REGION` — `ap-south-2`
- `AWS_S3_BUCKET_NAME` — `dreamlinepro`
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL` — `https://dreamlineproduction.com`
